subcodes.title: Words to some Persian friends, spoken on 1913-03-18
subcodes.first_line: Paris is like a very large, clean stable where many millions of horses are well-fed, well-kept and well-trained; but you do not expect to find spirituality.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
